_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in implementing AI application guardrails, including input validation, output filtering, safety classifiers, and human-in-the-loop intervention points.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-S-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-S-009 (LS, cosine: 0.434), AI-S-014 (AI, cosine: 0.417).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.8/10 (raw 0.479). Shared vocabulary: [skill]. DCWF-only terms [selectors, targeting] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, application, classifiers, filtering, guardrails, human] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.872 (P=0.887, R=0.857). P exceeds R by 0.031 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (97.4%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Skill in targeting (e.g., selectors)." and "Skill in implementing AI application guardrails, including input validation, out". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.443 ≈ STS 0.479 (gap 0.037). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.7%. Shared tokens: [skill]. DCWF-only: [selectors, targeting]. WIDAI-only: [ai, application, classifiers, filtering, guardrails, human].

signals.detail: NLI contradiction 97.4% suggests semantic tension between the FDE and matched KSA. The competency domains may be adjacent but not functionally aligned.
